Marketing.name: Beehiiv
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered newsletter platform for creators and publishers
Marketing.description: Beehiiv is a newsletter-first platform with built-in AI writing tools, referral programs, and monetization features. It helps creators grow, engage, and monetize their audience with AI-assisted content creation, A/B testing, and advanced analytics.
Marketing.creator: Beehiiv Inc.

Marketing.name: Klaviyo
Marketing.tagline: AI-driven email and SMS marketing for ecommerce
Marketing.description: Klaviyo combines email and SMS marketing with deep ecommerce integrations and AI-powered personalization. Its predictive analytics engine forecasts customer behavior, automates segmentation, and optimizes send times for maximum revenue.
Marketing.creator: Klaviyo Inc.

Marketing.name: Customer.io
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered behavioral messaging automation platform
Marketing.description: Customer.io enables data-driven messaging across email, SMS, push notifications, and in-app messages. Its AI engine triggers messages based on real user behavior, helping marketers deliver the right message at the right time.
Marketing.creator: Customer.io

Marketing.name: Iterable
Marketing.tagline: AI cross-channel customer engagement platform
Marketing.description: Iterable is an AI-powered cross-channel marketing platform that unifies customer data and orchestrates personalized campaigns across email, SMS, push, in-app, and web. Its AI Brand Affinity scoring predicts customer intent.
Marketing.creator: Iterable Inc.

Marketing.name: Mailmodo
Marketing.tagline: Interactive email marketing with built-in AI
Marketing.description: Mailmodo lets marketers send interactive AMP emails with forms, surveys, quizzes, and shopping carts embedded directly inside emails. Its AI assistant generates email copy, subject lines, and automations.
Marketing.creator: Mailmodo Inc.

Marketing.name: Bardeen
Marketing.tagline: AI workflow automation for marketing and sales teams
Marketing.description: Bardeen is an AI-powered automation tool that connects marketing apps and automates repetitive tasks. It uses AI to build automations from natural language, scrape data from websites, and sync information across tools.
Marketing.creator: Bardeen Inc.

Marketing.name: Originality.ai
Marketing.tagline: AI content detection and plagiarism checking for marketers
Marketing.description: Originality.ai is the most accurate AI content detection tool, helping marketing teams verify content authenticity. It checks for AI-generated text, plagiarism, and provides fact-checking with supporting links.
Marketing.creator: Originality.ai

Marketing.name: Hemingway Editor Plus
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered writing clarity and readability tool
Marketing.description: Hemingway Editor uses AI to make writing bold and clear. It highlights complex sentences, passive voice, and readability issues, then offers AI-powered rewrites to simplify and strengthen copy.
Marketing.creator: Hemingway Editor

Marketing.name: Loom AI
Marketing.tagline: AI-enhanced video messaging for marketing teams
Marketing.description: Loom combines screen recording with AI-powered features that automatically remove filler words, generate video titles, summaries, and promotional messages. Perfect for creating product demos, testimonials, and personalized outreach.
Marketing.creator: Loom Inc. (Atlassian)

Marketing.name: Unbounce
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered landing page builder and conversion platform
Marketing.description: Unbounce uses AI to create high-converting landing pages, popups, and sticky bars. Its Smart Traffic feature automatically routes visitors to the landing page variant most likely to convert based on AI predictions.
Marketing.creator: Unbounce Marketing Solutions

Marketing.name: ActiveCampaign
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered email marketing, automation, and CRM
Marketing.description: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing, marketing automation, and CRM with AI-powered features including predictive sending, win probability scoring, and automated segmentation based on customer behavior.
Marketing.creator: ActiveCampaign

Marketing.name: Brevo
Marketing.tagline: All-in-one AI marketing platform (formerly Sendinblue)
Marketing.description: Brevo is a comprehensive marketing platform offering email, SMS, WhatsApp, chat, and CRM with AI-powered content generation, send-time optimization, and automated customer journeys.
Marketing.creator: Brevo

Marketing.name: Omnisend
Marketing.tagline: AI ecommerce marketing automation for Shopify stores
Marketing.description: Omnisend is built specifically for ecommerce, combining email, SMS, and push notifications with AI-powered product recommendations, automated workflows, and audience segmentation.
Marketing.creator: Omnisend

Marketing.name: Taplio
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered LinkedIn content creation and growth tool
Marketing.description: Taplio uses AI to help professionals create engaging LinkedIn content, schedule posts, analyze performance, and grow their personal brand. It generates post ideas, carousels, and hooks based on trending topics.
Marketing.creator: Taplio

Marketing.name: Typefully
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered Twitter/X writing and scheduling tool
Marketing.description: Typefully helps creators and marketers write, schedule, and grow on Twitter/X with AI-powered writing assistance, thread creation, analytics, and auto-DM features.
Marketing.creator: Typefully

Marketing.name: Beacons
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered link-in-bio and creator monetization platform
Marketing.description: Beacons provides creators with an AI-powered link-in-bio page, online store, media kit builder, and email marketing tools. Its AI generates media kits, pricing, and outreach emails automatically.
Marketing.creator: Beacons AI Inc.

Marketing.name: GetResponse
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered email marketing and automation platform
Marketing.description: GetResponse offers AI-powered email marketing with features like AI email generator, autoresponders, landing pages, webinars, and conversion funnels. Its AI creates email copy and subject lines optimized for engagement.
Marketing.creator: GetResponse

Marketing.name: Drip
Marketing.tagline: AI ecommerce email marketing automation
Marketing.description: Drip is purpose-built for ecommerce brands, offering AI-powered email and SMS automation with deep Shopify and WooCommerce integrations. It automatically segments customers and triggers personalized campaigns.
Marketing.creator: Drip

Marketing.name: Vidyard
Marketing.tagline: AI video platform for sales and marketing
Marketing.description: Vidyard helps marketing and sales teams create, host, and track AI-powered video content. Its AI avatar feature creates personalized video messages at scale, while analytics track viewer engagement.
Marketing.creator: Vidyard

Marketing.name: Ortto
Marketing.tagline: AI-powered customer data platform and marketing automation
Marketing.description: Ortto unifies customer data, analytics, and marketing automation in one platform. Its AI engine creates audience segments, predicts customer behavior, and automates multi-channel journeys based on real-time data.
Marketing.creator: Ortto

Business.name: Clay
Business.tagline: AI data enrichment and sales prospecting platform
Business.description: Clay combines 150+ data providers with AI research agents to enrich leads, personalize outreach, and automate GTM workflows. Its Claygent AI agent researches companies and contacts, while waterfall enrichment maximizes data coverage.
Business.creator: Clay Inc.

Business.name: Lavender
Business.tagline: AI email coaching for sales professionals
Business.description: Lavender is an AI sales email coach that scores emails in real-time, suggests improvements, and personalizes outreach based on prospect data. It integrates with Gmail, Outlook, and major sales engagement platforms.
Business.creator: Lavender AI

Business.name: Regie.ai
Business.tagline: AI-powered outbound content generation for sales
Business.description: Regie.ai uses generative AI to create personalized sales emails, sequences, and cadences at scale. It analyzes prospect data and company context to produce relevant, engaging outreach content.
Business.creator: Regie.ai

Business.name: 11x.ai
Business.tagline: AI digital sales workers that automate outreach
Business.description: 11x.ai provides AI-powered digital workers including 'Alice' for automated outbound sales and 'Jordan' for inbound phone qualification. These AI agents work 24/7 to research, personalize, and engage prospects.
Business.creator: 11x AI Ltd.

Business.name: AiSDR
Business.tagline: AI sales development representative as a service
Business.description: AiSDR provides an AI-powered SDR that handles prospecting, outreach, and meeting booking. It writes personalized emails, follows up automatically, and books qualified meetings on your calendar.
Business.creator: AiSDR Inc.

Business.name: Instantly
Business.tagline: AI cold email platform for scalable outreach
Business.description: Instantly is a cold email platform with AI-powered email warmup, deliverability optimization, and lead generation. It allows users to send thousands of personalized emails daily with AI-generated content.
Business.creator: Instantly AI

Business.name: Gamma
Business.tagline: AI-powered presentations, documents, and websites
Business.description: Gamma uses AI to create beautiful presentations, documents, and webpages from text prompts. It generates layouts, images, and content with a Notion-like editor, making it fast to create professional materials.
Business.creator: Gamma.app

Business.name: Clari
Business.tagline: AI-powered revenue forecasting and pipeline management
Business.description: Clari uses AI to analyze pipeline data, predict deal outcomes, and provide revenue intelligence. It gives sales leaders visibility into forecast accuracy, deal risk, and revenue leakage across the entire revenue process.
Business.creator: Clari Inc.

Business.name: Lovable
Business.tagline: AI full-stack app builder from natural language
Business.description: Lovable is an AI-powered development platform that builds full-stack web applications from natural language descriptions. It generates production-ready code with database, auth, and deployment included.
Business.creator: Lovable (formerly GPT Engineer)

Business.name: Cursor
Business.tagline: AI-first code editor for software development
Business.description: Cursor is an AI-powered code editor built on VS Code that integrates AI pair programming directly into the coding workflow. It uses multiple AI models to write, edit, and debug code with context-aware suggestions.
Business.creator: Anysphere Inc.

Business.name: Replit
Business.tagline: AI-powered cloud development and deployment platform
Business.description: Replit is a browser-based IDE with integrated AI that helps write, debug, and deploy code. Its AI Agent can build entire applications from descriptions, while Ghostwriter provides real-time code suggestions.
Business.creator: Replit Inc.

Business.name: Vainu
Business.tagline: AI-powered B2B sales intelligence platform
Business.description: Vainu provides real-time company data and buying signals using AI. It analyzes millions of data points to identify companies showing buying intent, technographic changes, and growth signals.
Business.creator: Vainu

Business.name: Planhat
Business.tagline: AI-powered customer success platform
Business.description: Planhat is a customer success platform that uses AI to predict churn, identify expansion opportunities, and automate health scoring. It provides a unified view of customer data with actionable insights.
Business.creator: Planhat AB

Business.name: MagicBlocks.ai
Business.tagline: AI sales agents that convert leads autonomously
Business.description: MagicBlocks provides AI Sales Agents that engage inbound leads in under 5 seconds, qualify through natural conversation, follow up persistently, and reactivate aged CRM leads. Uses HAPPA sales framework.
Business.creator: MagicBlocks

Business.name: Chili Piper
Business.tagline: AI-powered scheduling and routing for revenue teams
Business.description: Chili Piper automates meeting scheduling, lead routing, and handoffs for sales teams. Its AI ensures inbound leads are instantly routed to the right rep and booked on their calendar in real-time.
Business.creator: Chili Piper Inc.

Business.name: Seamless.AI
Business.tagline: AI-powered B2B contact and company data platform
Business.description: Seamless.AI uses AI to find and verify B2B contact data in real-time, including direct dials, emails, and company information. It integrates with major CRMs and sales engagement platforms for seamless prospecting.
Business.creator: Seamless.AI

Business.name: Supademo
Business.tagline: AI-powered interactive product demos and guides
Business.description: Supademo creates interactive product demos and guides using AI. It automatically captures product workflows, adds AI narration, and generates step-by-step guides that prospects and customers can explore at their own pace.
Business.creator: Supademo Inc.

Business.name: Windsurf
Business.tagline: AI-powered coding assistant and IDE
Business.description: Windsurf (formerly Codeium) is an AI code editor with Cascade, an agentic AI that understands codebases, writes multi-file edits, and executes terminal commands. It supports 70+ languages with context-aware completions.
Business.creator: Codeium

Business.name: Pipedrive AI
Business.tagline: AI-powered sales CRM for small businesses
Business.description: Pipedrive combines a visual sales pipeline with AI-powered features including deal probability predictions, activity recommendations, email summarization, and automated data entry to help sales teams close more deals.
Business.creator: Pipedrive OÜ

Business.name: Freshsales
Business.tagline: AI-powered sales CRM with built-in phone and chat
Business.description: Freshsales offers an AI-powered CRM with Freddy AI providing deal insights, predictive scoring, workflow automation, and intelligent recommendations. It includes built-in phone, email, chat, and WhatsApp.
Business.creator: Freshworks Inc.

Creative.name: Udio
Creative.tagline: AI music generator creating studio-quality songs
Creative.description: Udio is an AI music generation platform that creates full songs with vocals, instruments, and production from text prompts. It supports multiple genres and can generate radio-ready tracks in seconds.
Creative.creator: Udio Inc.

Creative.name: PixVerse
Creative.tagline: AI video generator with high-quality motion
Creative.description: PixVerse creates high-quality AI videos from text and images with superior motion consistency. It offers text-to-video, image-to-video, and character animation with an API for developers.
Creative.creator: PixVerse

Creative.name: Hailuo AI
Creative.tagline: MiniMax-powered AI video generation platform
Creative.description: Hailuo AI (by MiniMax) generates cinematic AI videos with exceptional quality. It produces realistic motion, consistent characters, and has been recognized as one of the top AI video generators globally.
Creative.creator: MiniMax

Creative.name: Veo 3
Creative.tagline: Google's breakthrough AI video generation model
Creative.description: Veo 3 is Google DeepMind's flagship video generation model, widely regarded as the breakthrough moment for AI video in 2025. It generates high-fidelity, physically consistent videos with native audio generation.
Creative.creator: Google DeepMind

Creative.name: CapCut
Creative.tagline: AI-powered video editor with 736M+ monthly users
Creative.description: CapCut is the world's most popular AI video editor with over 736 million monthly active users. Its AI features include background removal, auto-captions, text-to-video, AI effects, and one-click editing tools.
Creative.creator: ByteDance

Creative.name: ElevenLabs
Creative.tagline: AI voice generation, cloning, and dubbing platform
Creative.description: ElevenLabs provides the most realistic AI voice generation technology, supporting voice cloning, multilingual dubbing, and text-to-speech. Its voices are indistinguishable from human recordings and used across media, gaming, and content.
Creative.creator: ElevenLabs Inc.

Creative.name: Mureka
Creative.tagline: AI music generator for unique melodies and tracks
Creative.description: Mureka is an AI music generation platform that creates unique, customizable songs and tracks for any project. It supports multiple genres, custom lyrics, and provides royalty-free music for content creators.
Creative.creator: Mureka AI

Creative.name: Nano Banana Pro
Creative.tagline: Google's advanced AI image generator with reasoning
Creative.description: Nano Banana Pro is Google's premium AI image generation model with 'thinking' capabilities. It generates up to 4K images with exceptional character consistency, text rendering, and series coherence.
Creative.creator: Google DeepMind

Creative.name: Imagen 4
Creative.tagline: Google's flagship photorealistic AI image model
Creative.description: Imagen 4 is Google's state-of-the-art image generation model offering photorealistic and editorial-style outputs. Available via Gemini API, AI Studio, and Vertex AI with multiple speed variants.
Creative.creator: Google DeepMind

Creative.name: Krea.ai
Creative.tagline: Real-time AI image and video generation canvas
Creative.description: Krea.ai offers real-time AI generation with an interactive canvas for iterative refinement. It features a 22K upscaler, infinite zoom, video generation, and enhancement tools for creative professionals.
Creative.creator: Krea Technologies

Creative.name: GenType
Creative.tagline: AI tool for creating custom alphabets and typefaces
Creative.description: GenType by Google Labs generates custom alphabets and letterforms from text prompts. Create themed typefaces in 3D, textured, or illustrative styles for branding and design projects.
Creative.creator: Google Labs

Creative.name: Google Whisk
Creative.tagline: AI image-to-image generative tool with visual prompts
Creative.description: Whisk by Google Labs uses up to three visual prompts—subject, scene, and style—instead of text to generate images. It enables precise visual composition without writing complex prompts.
Creative.creator: Google Labs

Creative.name: CivitAI
Creative.tagline: AI image generation community and model hub
Creative.description: CivitAI is the largest community platform for AI image generation, hosting thousands of Stable Diffusion models, LoRAs, and workflows. Users can discover, share, and generate images using community-created models.
Creative.creator: CivitAI

Creative.name: Picsart AI
Creative.tagline: AI-powered photo and video editing for everyone
Creative.description: Picsart combines AI photo editing, video editing, and design tools in one platform. Its AI features include background removal, AI enhance, AI writer, and generative fill for quick creative work.
Creative.creator: Picsart Inc.

Creative.name: Freepik AI
Creative.tagline: AI image generation integrated with design resources
Creative.description: Freepik combines millions of stock design resources with AI-powered image generation, AI image upscaler, and AI presentation maker. It's a one-stop platform for designers needing both AI and traditional assets.
Creative.creator: Freepik Company

Creative.name: ImagineArt
Creative.tagline: Multi-model AI video and image generation platform
Creative.description: ImagineArt provides access to multiple AI models including Veo 3, Kling, Hailuo, and PixVerse under one platform. It offers text-to-video, image generation, and creative tools for content creators.
Creative.creator: ImagineArt

Creative.name: Sora
Creative.tagline: OpenAI's AI video generation platform
Creative.description: Sora is OpenAI's video generation model that creates realistic videos from text prompts and images. It reached 1 million downloads faster than ChatGPT and supports digital likeness (Cameos) for personalized video creation.
Creative.creator: OpenAI

Creative.name: Microsoft MAI-Image-2
Creative.tagline: Microsoft's top-ranked AI image generation model
Creative.description: MAI-Image-2 is Microsoft's in-house text-to-image model, ranked #3 on the Arena.ai leaderboard. It features perfect text rendering and highly expressive human anatomy and lighting, integrated into Bing and Copilot.
Creative.creator: Microsoft

Creative.name: Seedance
Creative.tagline: ByteDance's next-gen AI video generation model
Creative.description: Seedance is ByteDance's advanced AI video generation model (successor to Kling). Seedance 2.0-based applications are expected to feature prominently in 2026, offering high-quality motion and character consistency for cinematic video creation.
Creative.creator: ByteDance

Creative.name: GLM-Image
Creative.tagline: Open-source industrial-grade AI image model
Creative.description: GLM-Image is a 16B parameter hybrid autoregressive + diffusion model with best-in-class text rendering. Open-source under Apache 2.0, it excels at text-heavy imagery like posters, infographics, and typography.
Creative.creator: Zhipu AI (Z.ai)
